creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
I found one problem with this patch, the use of WITH_BDB_HIGHEST is a user 
setable variable only, it should not be used within a ports Makefile.

Attached is a corrected patch that used BDB_LIB_DIR, BDB_INCLUDE_DIR, and 
BDB_LIB_NAME to set the desired BDB to use.

Scot
